---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use Case

What are you trying to build or improve?

## Proposed API or Behavior

Describe the API, configuration, visual behavior, or workflow you would like.

## Alternatives Considered

What workarounds or alternatives have you considered?

## Scope Notes

Mention whether this should affect the core renderer, React wrapper, icons, demo, docs, or package build.
